Home.title: AICE UI
Home.description: An open-source UI component library to help you build applications faster. It provides pre-built components like conversations, messages and more. Built with Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui.

UsagePage.title: Usage
UsagePage.description: Install components via Aice UI CLI or shadcn CLI registry. You can also copy source files manually.

prerequisites.title: Prerequisites
prerequisites.tailwind: Tailwind CSS set up in your project
prerequisites.shadcn: Optional: shadcn initialized for registry-based install

aiceCli.title: Aice UI CLI
aiceCli.description: Recommended. Add components by slug and let the CLI handle dependencies.

shadcnCli.title: shadcn CLI (registry URL)
shadcnCli.description: If you already use shadcn, you can add components directly from this site registry.
shadcnCli.registryHint: Tip: replace <component> with a component slug (e.g. glass-surface).

manualCopy.title: Manual copy
manualCopy.description: You can also copy the source into your project.
manualCopy.point1: Copy the component files from this repo into your project (e.g. components/*).
manualCopy.point2: Make sure Tailwind config, CSS variables, and required packages match the component.
manualCopy.point3: Check the component page for preview and example code.

q1.q: Which install method should I use?
q1.a: Use Aice UI CLI for the simplest setup. If you already use shadcn, the registry URL approach is also great.

q2.a: Make sure the slug exists and the registry is built/published. The URL format is /r/<component>.json.

q3.a: Use shadcn's --cwd option to point to the app directory, then run init/add in that workspace.

install.title: Install
install.description: Use Aice UI CLI or Shadcn CLI to install the component.

usage.title: Usage
usage.description: The usage and properties of the component are not yet documented.

glass-surface.label: Glass Surface
glass-surface.description: A glass surface component with blur and distortion effects.

props.width: Width of the surface (number in px or CSS string).
props.height: Height of the surface (number in px or CSS string).
props.borderWidth: Relative border/edge width for the displacement effect (e.g. 0.07).
props.brightness: Brightness value for the glass effect.
props.displace: Displacement amount for the distortion effect.
props.backgroundOpacity: Opacity of the inner background layer.
props.distortionScale: Scale of the SVG displacement map (negative values invert).
props.redOffset: Red channel offset for displacement mapping.
props.greenOffset: Green channel offset for displacement mapping.
props.blueOffset: Blue channel offset for displacement mapping.
props.xChannel: Color channel used for horizontal displacement (R, G, or B).
props.yChannel: Color channel used for vertical displacement (R, G, or B).
props.mixBlendMode: CSS mix-blend-mode for compositing (e.g. difference, overlay).
props.className: Additional CSS class for the root container.
props.contentClassName: Additional CSS class for the inner content wrapper.
props.style: Inline styles for the root element.

code-block.label: Code Block
code-block.description: A code block component with syntax highlighting and line numbers.

snippet.label: Snippet
snippet.description: One-line code or command display with copy button. Compound component: Provider, Input, Addon, Text, CopyButton. Use for install commands, tokens, or copyable snippets.

props.className: Additional CSS class for the root container.
props.onCopy: Called after the code is copied successfully.
props.onError: Called when copying fails (e.g. Clipboard API unavailable).
props.timeout: Time in ms to keep the copied state before resetting.

pop-up-item.label: Pop Up Item
pop-up-item.description: Animated container that reveals content with pop-up spring animation. Supports whileInView, hover, or click triggers.

timer.label: Timer
timer.description: A reusable timer that shows elapsed time. Start, pause, or restart with buttons; choose display format (e.g. 00:01:23 or 83.250s).

radar-chart.label: Radar Chart
radar-chart.description: A radar chart component with customizable data and optional title and description.

radial-cluster.label: Radial Cluster
radial-cluster.description: Radial cluster chart for hierarchical data. Supports data prop or Item/SubItem composition.

copy-button.label: Copy Button
copy-button.description: A button that copies text to the clipboard. Shows a check icon after copying. Use it next to code blocks, quotes, or any text you want users to copy in one click.

theme-switch.label: Theme Switch
theme-switch.description: A theme switch component with dark and light mode. It is built with React, Tailwind CSS, and Motion.

scroll-button.label: Scroll Button
scroll-button.description: Buttons that scroll the window (top, bottom, up, down, left, right). Use for quick page navigation.

floating-circles.label: Floating Circles
floating-circles.description: A floating circles component with customizable data and optional title and description.

props.gradientBackgroundStart: CSS color for the gradient background start (e.g. rgb(108, 0, 162)).
props.gradientBackgroundEnd: CSS color for the gradient background end (e.g. rgb(0, 17, 82)).
props.firstColor: RGB values for the first circle color (e.g. "20, 72, 140").
props.secondColor: RGB values for the second circle color.
props.thirdColor: RGB values for the third circle color.
props.fourthColor: RGB values for the fourth circle color.
props.fifthColor: RGB values for the fifth circle color.
props.pointerColor: RGB values for the pointer-following circle (shown when interactive).
props.size: Size of the gradient circles (e.g. "80%" or CSS length).
props.blendingValue: CSS mix-blend-mode for the circles (e.g. hard-light, overlay).
props.children: Content rendered above the background (e.g. hero text).
props.className: Additional CSS class for the content wrapper.
props.interactive: Whether to show a circle that follows the pointer.
props.containerClassName: Additional CSS class for the root container.

matrix-code.label: Matrix Code
matrix-code.description: A matrix code component with glitch effect and optional vignette effect.

props.glitchColors: Hex color array for the glitch characters (e.g. green/cyan palette).
props.glitchSpeed: Interval in ms between character/color updates; lower is faster.
props.centerVignette: Whether to apply a dark vignette overlay in the center.
props.outerVignette: Whether to apply a dark vignette overlay at the edges.
props.smooth: Whether to smoothly interpolate color changes; false for instant switches.
props.className: Additional CSS class for the container.

perlin-noise.label: Perlin Noise
perlin-noise.description: Canvas-based Perlin noise wave grid background. Configurable line color, wave speed and amplitude; mouse and touch interaction affect grid displacement.

props.lineColor: Stroke color of the wave grid lines (CSS color).
props.backgroundColor: Background color of the container (CSS color).
props.waveSpeedX: Horizontal speed of the Perlin wave animation.
props.waveSpeedY: Vertical speed of the Perlin wave animation.
props.waveAmpX: Horizontal amplitude of the wave displacement in pixels.
props.waveAmpY: Vertical amplitude of the wave displacement in pixels.
props.xGap: Horizontal spacing between grid lines in pixels.
props.yGap: Vertical spacing between points on each line in pixels.
props.friction: Decay factor for cursor-induced motion (0–1); higher values mean longer drift.
props.tension: Spring tension pulling points back toward rest after cursor interaction.
props.maxCursorMove: Maximum pixel displacement of grid points from cursor/touch influence.
props.style: Inline CSS styles for the root container.
props.className: Additional CSS class for the root container.

star-background.label: Star Background
star-background.description: Canvas 2D starfield background. Configurable star count, twinkle speed, and color. Suited for hero sections or page backgrounds with optional overlay content.

props.starCount: Number of stars to render in the canvas.
props.twinkleSpeed: Speed of the twinkle animation (0 to disable).
props.starColor: Star color as RGB comma-separated string (e.g. "255, 255, 255").
props.backgroundColor: Background color of the canvas (CSS color).
props.className: Additional CSS class for the canvas element.
props.containerClassName: Additional CSS class for the outer container.
props.children: Optional overlay content rendered above the starfield.
props.style: Inline CSS styles for the root container.

ascii-art.label: Ascii Art
ascii-art.description: Renders an image as ASCII art with configurable resolution, character set, and colors. Supports fade, typewriter, and matrix animations; use AsciiArtStatic for non-animated output.

props.src: Image URL to convert to ASCII art (subject to CORS).
props.resolution: Number of ASCII columns (character resolution). Higher values give more detail.
props.charset: Preset name (e.g. standard, blocks, binary) or custom character string for brightness mapping.
props.color: Text color for the ASCII art (ignored when colored is true).
props.inverted: When true, uses dark background and light text (reverses charset order).
props.colored: When true, uses image colors for each character instead of a single text color.
props.animated: When true, runs the selected animation on load.
props.animationStyle: Animation type: fade, typewriter, matrix, or none.
props.animationDuration: Duration of the fade animation in seconds.
props.fontFamily: Font family for the ASCII characters (e.g. monospace).
props.className: Additional CSS class for the container (e.g. w-full, aspect-video).
props.animateOnView: When true, animation starts only when the component is in view.
props.objectFit: How the image fits the ASCII grid: cover, contain, or fill.

webcam.label: Webcam
webcam.description: A webcam component that streams the user's camera with configurable resolution and optional audio. Supports ref forwarding and shows an error message when camera access fails.

props.audio: Whether to request the microphone stream.
props.className: Additional CSS class for the <video> element.
props.containerClassName: Additional CSS class for the outer container.

pixelated-canvas.label: Pixelated Canvas
pixelated-canvas.description: Convert any image to a pixelated canvas with mouse distortion effects.

props.src: Image URL to render (subject to CORS).
props.variant: When "static", disables pointer interaction; "interactive" or undefined enables it.
props.cellSize: Size of each sampling cell in CSS pixels.
props.dotScale: Dot size as a fraction of cell size (0–1).
props.shape: Shape of each dot: circle or square.
props.backgroundColor: Background color to clear the canvas with before drawing.
props.grayscale: When true, convert image to grayscale before drawing.
props.className: Additional CSS class for the canvas element.
props.responsive: When true, redraw on window resize using the given width/height.
props.dropoutStrength: 0–1. Higher values remove more dots in low-contrast regions.
props.interactive: When true, enable mouse distortion animation (overridden by variant="static").
props.distortionStrength: Max per-dot offset in pixels due to distortion.
props.distortionRadius: Radius in pixels around the pointer that influences distortion.
props.distortionMode: How dots move near the pointer: repel, attract, or swirl.
props.sampleAverage: When true, average multiple samples per cell instead of center only.
props.tintStrength: 0–1 tint mix amount with original colors.
props.maxFps: Cap animation frame rate for performance on large canvases.
props.objectFit: Object-fit behavior for the source image: cover, contain, fill, or none.
props.jitterStrength: Random motion amplitude for dots near the pointer.
props.jitterSpeed: Speed factor for the random motion.
props.fadeOnLeave: When true, smoothly fade distortion when the pointer leaves (overridden by variant="static").
props.fadeSpeed: 0–1 smoothing factor for leave fade; higher is faster.

heatmap-canvas.label: Heatmap Canvas
heatmap-canvas.description: Renders a source image with a heatmap visual effect by mapping pixel intensity to a color gradient.

props.src: Image URL (must be CORS-enabled for canvas read).
props.colormap: Color gradient: thermal, viridis, jet, or grayscale.
props.intensitySource: Intensity source: luminance, r, g, or b.
props.objectFit: How the image fits: cover, contain, fill, or none.
props.fill: When true, the component fills its outer container; size is determined by ResizeObserver. Parent must have explicit dimensions (e.g. h-64 or aspect-video).
props.className: Additional CSS class for the container.

motion-wheel.label: Motion Wheel
motion-wheel.description: A compound carousel wheel with rotation animation, prev/next navigation, dot indicators, and optional center info panel. Supports keyboard control (ArrowLeft/ArrowRight) when focused.

props.items: Data array for wheel items; each item must have an id.
props.className: Additional CSS class for the element.
props.radius: Wheel radius in pixels; responsive default (desktop 320, mobile 270).
props.spring: Spring animation config: stiffness, damping, duration.
props.initialIndex: Index of the initially focused item.
props.wheelChildren: Render function (item, index) => ReactNode for each wheel item.
props.index: Index of the item in the wheel (MotionWheel.Item).
props.prevClassName: CSS class for the previous (left) navigation button.
props.nextClassName: CSS class for the next (right) navigation button.
props.centerInfoChildren: Render function (item) => ReactNode for the center info panel content.

3d-card.label: 3D Card
3d-card.description: A card that tilts in 3D following your cursor on hover. Child elements can float at different depths for a parallax effect.

3d-flip-card.label: 3D Flip Card
3d-flip-card.description: A compound flip card with 3D tilt on hover and click-to-flip front/back.

glyph-katakana.label: Glyph Katakana
glyph-katakana.description: A text component with decoding animation—random katakana glyphs gradually resolve to reveal the target text.

slide-up-letters.label: Slide Up Letters
slide-up-letters.description: A slide up letters component with customizable data and optional title and description.

animated-counter.label: Animated Counter
animated-counter.description: A number counter that animates from a starting value to a target when it enters the viewport.

decrypted-text.label: Decrypted Text
decrypted-text.description: Scrambled text that reveals on hover or when in view. Supports sequential or batch reveal, and multiple reveal directions.

text-hover-effect.label: Text Hover Effect
text-hover-effect.description: Text that reveals a cursor-following gradient and stroke animation on hover.

props.text: The text to display. Revealed with cursor-following gradient and stroke animation on hover.
props.duration: Duration (s) for the radial mask to follow the cursor. Use 0 for instant follow. Default: 0.
props.className: Optional CSS class for the root SVG container (e.g. width, height, margin).
props.textClassName: Optional CSS class merged into all text elements (e.g. font size, font family, stroke).

draggable-grid.label: Draggable Grid
draggable-grid.description: A draggable 2D grid with parallax icon cells. Inspired by Apple WatchOS.

props.children: Root/Grid: child nodes. Item: custom content; when provided, item (link+image+tooltip) is ignored.
props.className: Optional CSS class for the container.
props.iconSize: Size (px) of each grid cell/icon. Used for layout and parallax.
props.linkComponent: Custom component for links (e.g. Next.js Link). Receives href and children.
props.fallback: ReactNode shown before mount (e.g. loading). If set, Root renders it instead of default loading UI.
props.dragConstraints: Bounds for dragging: { left, right, top, bottom } in px. Limits how far the grid plane can be dragged.
props.row: Item's row index in the grid (0-based).
props.col: Item's column index in the grid (0-based).
props.index: Item order for stagger animation delay.
props.item: Data for default cell: { id, href?, image?, label? }. When set, renders link + image/tooltip; omit and use children for custom content.

timeline.label: Timeline
timeline.description: Vertical timeline with sticky year on the left and card content on the right. Optional scroll-driven axis fill effect.

speed-dial.label: Speed Dial
speed-dial.description: FAB that expands into a radial menu of actions. Compound component: Root, Trigger, Item. Supports spread angle and direction.

props.children: Root: Trigger and Item components. Trigger: optional icon or label for the FAB. Item: icon or label for the action button.
props.spreadRangeAngle: Total angle (degrees) the items spread over. e.g. 360 full circle, 180 half, 30 narrow.
props.directionAngle: Direction of the fan: 0° = right, 90° = down, 180° = left, 270° = up.
props.radius: Distance from trigger to each item (px).
props.itemSize: Default size for all SpeedDial.Item children (sm, default, lg).
props.className: Optional CSS class for the Root container.
props.variant: Trigger button style: default, outline, or secondary.
props.size: Trigger or Item size: default, sm, or lg. On Item, overrides Root's itemSize.
props.onClick: Callback when the Item is clicked (menu closes after).

floating-dock.label: Floating Dock
floating-dock.description: Bottom navigation dock with magnify-on-hover. Desktop bar at bottom; mobile collapses to hamburger menu.

props.items: Array of nav items: title, icon (ReactNode), and href. Rendered in both desktop bar and mobile menu.
props.desktopClassName: Optional CSS class for the desktop dock container (visible from md breakpoint).
props.mobileClassName: Optional CSS class for the mobile dock wrapper (visible below md; wraps the hamburger trigger and expanded menu).
